nation: Mosquito Grizzly Bears Head Lean Man First Nation
one_time_description: 1905 Surrender Legacy Trust distribution of $3,800,000 received as revenue
economic_notes: GBEs include MGBHLM TLE Makah Holding Corp, MGBHLM Economic Development Company LP, MGBHLM Economic Development Company Ltd, and MGBHLM Petroleum Company Ltd. Daycare previously a GBE was consolidated into band operations in current year. First Nation has pending Treaty 6 Benefits Specific Claim and Surrender Claim against Canada.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Prior year (2020) figures were restated due to corrections in investment in GBEs, due from related parties, and long-term debt with net effect of $2,151 decrease to accumulated surplus. The 1905 Surrender Legacy Trust $3,800,000 is a significant one-time item. Short-term financing of $3,800,000 for per capita distribution was secured and repaid in July 2021. Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with net losses totaling $545,241 in the year. Accumulated surplus includes $17.7M restricted and $(6.7M) unrestricted. Statement of accumulated surplus shows $10,982,095 while balance sheet shows $10,982,099 - minor rounding discrepancy in source document. No schedule of remuneration found in extracted text. TLE Trust excluded from consolidation as governed by independent trustees. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($12,769,247) + CMHC ($68,107) + Saskatchewan Government ($36,982) + SITAG ($179,363) + Trust funds ($470605) + Battle River Treaty 6 ($114133) + BATC ($78253) - net ($36,663) not all confirmed as government transfers; estimated conservatively. annual_debt_service calculated as LTD repayment $160,125 + CMHC repayment $59,389 = $219,514.
